title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Market Cools Amid Sanctions, Holiday Slowdown, and Increased Uncertainty - The VLCC (Very Large Crude Carrier) freight market, which experienced a significant surge earlier this month following the implementation of new Russian shipping sanctions, has rapidly cooled as January nears its end.
